end,function(M,T)local B=H(T)local R=function(R,A,S,k,W,t,X)return N(M,{R,A,S,k,W;t;X},T,B)end return R end,function(M,T)local B=H(T)local R=function(R,A,S,k,W,t)return N(M,{R,A,S,k,W;t},T,B)end
